name: reviving-ophelia
description: Mary Pipher's Reviving Ophelia — a groundbreaking examination of adolescent girls, the cultural pressures that silence them, and how parents and communities can help them reclaim their voices.
useCase: Understanding adolescent development, building self-esteem, navigating peer pressure, body image and eating disorders, family communication, recognizing signs of trouble.
knownRisks: The book was published in 1994 — social media pressures have intensified since then
Clinical case studies may not fit every situation
Serious mental health issues require professional intervention — this skill is not a substitute
